final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input enable,
    output reg clk_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (enable) begin
        clk_out <= 1'b1;
    end else begin
        clk_out <= 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
